439:   String _maskKey(String key) {

441:     return '${key.substring(0, 4)}...${key.substring(key.length - 4)}';

580:   Future<void> _save() async {
581:     final id = widget.existingKey?['id'] as String? ?? DateTime.now().millisecondsSinceEpoch.toString();
582:     final name = _nameCtl.text.trim();
583:     final key = _keyCtl.text.trim();
584:     final url = _urlCtl.text.trim();
585:     final model = _modelCtl.text.trim();
586: 
587:     if (key.isEmpty) return;
588: 
589:     final isActive = widget.existingKey?['isActive'] == true;
590: 
591:     final config = {
592:       'id': id,
593:       'name': name.isEmpty ? 'Key ${id.substring(id.length - 4)}' : name,
594:       'key': key,
595:       'baseUrl': url.isEmpty ? 'https://api.chatanywhere.tech/v1' : url,
596:       'model': model.isEmpty ? 'gpt-4o-mini' : model,
597:       'isActive': isActive,
598:     };
599: 
600:     if (widget.existingKey == null) {
601:       final keys = HiveService.getAiKeys();
602:       config['isActive'] = keys.isEmpty;
603:     }
604:     await HiveService.saveAiKey(config);
605:     await HiveService.clearApiKeyDraft();
606:     if (!mounted) return;
607:     Navigator.pop(context);
608:     widget.onSaved();
609:   }
610: }
